title: cynometra felicis
intro: Cynometra felicis, also known as the False Keayia or African Blackwood, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its seeds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The seeds contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to provide health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Cynometra felicis seeds are often used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and are also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
